response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience with open-source contributions, but his recent work lacks direct focus on C++/Rust or large-scale routing/navigation systems. His background in distributed systems and low-latency applications is relevant, but the role's core requirements (modern C++/Rust, routing pipelines) are not prominently featured in his recent roles.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data platforms (e.g., GISCollective, Open Green Map) and distributed systems.
Proven ability to optimize low-latency applications (e.g., Tencent, Dunnhumby) and work across the full stack.
Strong open-source contributions and problem-solving skills, including experimentation and data analysis.
concerns: Primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang, with limited recent C++/Rust experience (critical for this role).
No explicit experience with routing/navigation data pipelines or real-time traffic integration.
Recent roles focus on AI-agent infrastructure and full-stack development, diverging from the role's core technical stack.
